title: MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key Overview

detail.title: MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key Overview
detail.short_info: MAH BBA CET 2026 answer key and response sheet released at cetcell.mahacet.org. Check direct login link, steps to download, objection dates and result date.

content.text: MAH BBA CET 2026 answer key and response sheet are being released today, 21 May 2026, on the State CET Cell website cetcell.mahacet.org for all candidates who appeared for the exam. Candidates will be able to log in using their credentials, view the official answers, download their response sheet and raise objections within the specified dates.

State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra, is releasing the MAH BBA CET 2026 answer key and response sheet today, 21 May 2026, in online mode only. The objection window will open along with the answer key release, and candidates can submit challenges up to 23 May 2026. As per the latest update, the MAH BBA CET 2026 result is expected in the first week of June 2026 (tentatively).

sections.heading: MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key Overview
Direct Link to MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key Login

content.text: The MAH BBA CET 2026 answer key and response sheet will be accessible only through the official State CET Cell portal. You can place CTA buttons like:

items: Click here for MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key Login

content.text: These can point to the login URL used by CET Cell (central launchpad link) so that users directly reach the authentication page for AY 2026-29.

sections.heading: How to Download MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key and Response Sheet

content.text: Candidates must log in to the MAH BBA CET portal using their registered credentials to view the answer key. The process is simple and fully online.
Step-by-step process to check answer key

items: Visit the official MAH BBA CET website - cetcell.mahacet.org.
Click on “Candidate Registration AY 2026-29” or the MAH BBA CET 2026 answer key link as shown on the homepage.
Log in using your application number / registered email ID and password.
After logging in, go to the Objection Tracking tab under the UG courses section.
The MAH BBA CET 2026 answer key and your response sheet will be displayed on the screen.
Download the answer key and response sheet in PDF format and save them for reference.

content.text: Advise candidates to check the data such as name, roll number, test date and shift in the login area to ensure they are viewing the correct set.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key and Response Sheet

content.text: The official answer key and response sheet will contain important information that helps candidates verify their performance. Typical details include:

items: Candidate’s name and roll / application number
Exam date and shift
Question ID and section-wise breakup
Official answer option for each question
Candidate’s marked response for each question
Status of the response (correct / incorrect / not attempted)

content.text: Encourage aspirants to carefully match each question ID with the corresponding official key while calculating their score.

sections.heading: MAH BBA CET 2026 Answer Key - Important Instructions for Candidates

content.text: This section helps with user trust and engagement:

items: Use only the official answer key and response sheet released by State CET Cell for score estimation.
Download and save the PDFs before the objection window closes.
Raise objections in the prescribed format and within the deadline; late submissions are generally not accepted.
Final answer key will be released after evaluating all objections, and results will be prepared based on the final key.
Keep your login details (application number, password) safe to access the answer key, response sheet, and result.
